programmes.show_description: Phill Martin is well known for his popular, creative designs. His versatile Sentimentally Yours collections are a staple for any crafter! Tune in for a masterclass this hour.
Join Amanda for Birthday offers featuring the Florals and Frames Detailed Dies Bundle, Triple Dots and Squares Detailed Dies, Oval Stars and Stripes Detailed Dies, and more.
Phill Martin is well known for his popular, creative designs. His versatile Sentimentally Yours collections are a staple for any crafter! Tune in for a masterclass this hour.
Create beautiful crafts and cards with the Clean & Simple Elegant Blooms! This detailed card-making kit is perfect for beginners and includes everything you need to make cards.
Amy's back with a brand-new USB! Join her as she shares her expertise and demonstrates how to create impressive designs with her latest SVG files.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Join us this hour with Joseph Bear yarn bundles, King Cole Patterns and more - for avid knitters and crocheters!
Lucy Picksley joins us today to revisit the loved Elizabeth Bag, and brings a reimagined pattern with Lizzie. She also brings the new Lily Bag.
Discover the must-have tools Rebecca loves to use! From clever gadgets to trusted essentials, these favourites help make every project easier, more accurate, and more enjoyable.
Lucy Picksley joins us for a second hour with the new Hygge Quilt Pattern and revisits the Mount Divine Quilt.

programmes.show_name: Miss It Miss Out Quilt Kits
programmes.show_description: Don't miss your chance to grab these beautiful quilt kits while stocks last. With coordinated fabrics and ready-to-sew designs that take the guesswork out of colour matching.
Join Toni for new and exclusive items, including the Botanical Essence paper, stamp, and die bundle, the Floral Fusion stencil and die bundle, the Poetic Pansies bundle, and more.
Jamie is back with a special treat for our 4th birthday! Tune in for the launch of his brand new Diamonds collection, along with ideas to help you get started on your next project.
Goody Boxes are back and you can order yours today. Jam-packed with an exciting mix of Hunkydory goodies in a super stylish box. Full of craft essentials - discover what's inside!
Join Toni for new and exclusive items, including the Botanical Essence paper, stamp, and die bundle, the Floral Fusion stencil and die bundle, the Poetic Pansies bundle, and more.
Hailing from Nottinghamshire, the Dreamees always bring pretty projects and beautiful designs but always within everyone's budget. Tune in to find out why they are so popular.

Happy Birthday Rebecca Reid! Join us this hour as we kick off a weekend of celebrations!
...BOM Quilt: Rebecca Reid will be bringing us the first installment in the brand new Floral Dance Quilt Block of the Month, not to be missed!
...Kits: TOFT are back with beautiful brand new Spring Orchids and Easter crochet kits. Tune in this hour to get a free gift with every item purchased!
Rebecca Reid is back with a brand new stunning Patchwork Pinwheel Bag collection, in two beautiful colourways with matching zips!
Kerry Lord is back for her second hour of launching her brand new book Crochet Fairytales: Cottage Stories Book. All books are signed by Kerry and tune in for exclusive kits.
Milestones and Memories Collection celebrates life's most meaningful moments. Designed by Mark, thoughtful designs come together to create the perfect set for special occasions.
Don't miss the American Crafts show with Birthday Special prices! The We R Makers Universal Cinch is back - a game-changing tool for crafting, journaling, and bookmaking.
Achieve perfect folds, cuts, and stamped designs with the Sizzix Limited Edition Making Tools - the Scoring Board & Trimmer and Stencil & Stamp Tool, both in an exclusive colour.
Unwind and let creativity flow with Studio Light Colouring Pages Mandala and Aqua Markers, perfect for calm, colourful moments.
